title: scorzonella scapigera
intro: Scorzonella scapigera, also known as Scorzonera scapigera, is a perennial plant species in the family Asteraceae, commonly found in mountainous and alpine regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use as a diuretic and to treat various kidney and urinary issues. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems. Scorzonella scapigera can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
